title: Lesson 372: 奪う, 馬, 生まれ...

items.gloss: to snatch away; to dispossess; to steal
birth; birthplace; born in (country, month, imperial era, zodiac year, etc.)
Japanese apricot (Prunus mume); Japanese plum; ume; Chinese plum; lowest (of a three-tier ranking system)
to betray; to turn traitor to; to double-cross
noisy; loud; annoying; troublesome; tiresome; persistent; importunate; fussy; finicky; picky; particular; nagging; fastidious; bossy; shut up!; be quiet!
to sell (well); to be well known; to be popular; to be famous
